assertions.title: Reportes page loads after Title fix
assertions.issues: Page shows 'Something went wrong! Alert is not defined' error instead of loading the reportes page. This indicates the Title import fix did not resolve the issue, or the Alert component from Mantine is not properly imported in the -AdminReportesPage.tsx file.

summary: The /admin/reportes page still fails to load. The error message is 'Alert is not defined', which suggests there is a missing import for the Alert component in the reportes page component.
